'''âf-y-w-sh''' ('''kafayweshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:holla|holla]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-y-w-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:holla|holla]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-y-w-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kafayweshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifayweshoko|thifayweshoko]] || [[word:jifayweshoko|jifayweshoko]] || [[word:shifayweshoko|shifayweshoko]] || [[word:kifayweshoko|kifayweshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
